location.office_time_required: at least 3 days per week, including Mondays, Wednesdays, and Thursdays

level_signals: Minimum of 4 years of product management or relevant product experience
Expected to influence leadership and drive strategic conversations
Base range CAD $108,000 - $135,000 consistent with Mid-Senior PM in Toronto

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Minimum of 4 years of product management or relevant product experience.
Have a data driven mindset and are comfortable working with large data sets and technical internal tools.
Detail oriented with superior organizational skills -- balancing multiple projects, deadlines, and requests should be second nature to you.
History of effectively working cross functionally and bridging gaps with multiple teams.
Be able to define and analyze metrics that inform the success of products.
Strong communication skills and intuition for communication strategy at every level -- within teams, within the company, to users, to press, and other audiences.
Experience leading post-launch optimizations including developing testing strategies.

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Experience building B2C software or internal tools in large complex ecosystems.
Experience with Insurance Products or working closely with Insurance partners.

scope.surface: End-to-end Claims experience — accident reporting, internal records, insurance partner integrations, driver restoration workflows
scope.business_model: marketplace / ride-hailing (B2C), Insurance as largest variable cost
core_responsibilities: Lead the long-term vision, strategy, and product execution for the end to end claims process.
Integrate the latest ML, AI, and LLM tools into the overall process utilizing our large claims and telematics datasets to drive improvements for both accuracy and speed.
Focus on enabling key use cases, driving impact and balancing technical considerations.
Translate customer and internal-user needs into clear, well-defined functional and technical requirements backed by data analysis and deep understanding of the risk tech landscape.
Execute on the roadmap with proper OKRs and project tracking.
Communicate roadmaps, priorities and decisions across a wide spectrum of audiences from partner teams to executive levels.
Ensure that key leadership & stakeholders are aligned on proper priorities, opportunities and progress on key initiatives.

green_flags: Compensation range disclosed in local currency (CAD $108,000 - $135,000)
Clear product surface with real business impact (multi-billion dollar P&L)
Explicit hybrid schedule details provided (3 days/week, specific days named)
Flexibility to work from anywhere up to 4 weeks per year
Generous parental leave (18 weeks paid) and comprehensive benefits package
Role fills an existing vacancy — active headcount, not speculative
red_flags: No USD equivalent provided — compensation comparison requires CAD/USD conversion
Visa sponsorship not mentioned; unclear whether international candidates are eligible
Insurance domain experience is only a 'bonus' but role centers heavily on Insurance — domain ramp could be steep
Lyft discloses use of AI for applicant screening, which may affect candidate experience
